name: Walk of Fame Chocolate Star Shortcakes
recipeIngredient: 2 pints Vanilla ice cream or frozen yogurt
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Sift flour, 1/2 cup sugar, cocoa, baking powder, baking soda, and salt into a large bowl. Mix in chocolate chips. Add just enough chilled whipping cream to form dough that is firm enough to roll out. Turn dough onto a well-floured work surface. Using well-floured hands, pat dough to a 3/4-inch thick rectangle, frequently sliding a knife under the dough to prevent sticking. With a floured 2-inch star-shaped cookie cutter, cut out stars. Gather dough scraps; pat to a 3/4-inch-thick rectangle and cut out additional stars (for a total of about 24). Brush stars with butter and sprinkle with additional sugar. Arrange shortcake stars sugared side down on two heavy large baking sheets. Brush tops with butter and sprinkle with sugar. Bake until the shortcakes feel firm and a tester inserted into the center comes out with a few moist crumbs, about 22 minutes. Transfer to racks and cool.
Place a scoop of ice cream in each of 8 bowls. Garnish with sauce, berries, whipped cream, 1 or 2 stars, and mint if desired. Serve immediately.
